author: Anthony
name: Prefix-Conditioned Suffix Diffusion (Smoke)
blurb: True discrete diffusion non-record submission: keep a clean prefix, diffuse the future suffix with an absorbing mask process, and score with an explicit approximate diffusion PLL metric. A 4-step 1xGPU smoke run roundtrips to diffusion_pll_bpb=3.7199 under the 16MB cap.
notes: Metric is approximate prefix-conditioned diffusion pseudo-log-likelihood BPB, not exact autoregressive challenge BPB.
